data.name: Rustomjee BigQuery Referral- 3 - Credit (Source - Loyalty), (Loyalty and Site Visit Done

nodes.name: Adding 6000 Incentive for the payment within 5 days

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT *
FROM `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.sales_lead_app`
WHERE LeadSource = "Loyalty" AND Lead_Sub_Source__c = "Loyalty"
  AND Status__c = "Booked"
  AND SAL_ORD IS NOT NULL;

nodes.name: Query to fetch details of Source - Loyalty

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT *
FROM `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.sales_sv_oppr`
WHERE LeadSource = 'Loyalty'
  AND Lead_Sub_Source__c = "Loyalty"
  AND StageName IN ('Site Visit Done', 'Revisit Done')
  AND Booking__c_Status__c IN ('Booked', 'Processed')
  AND SAL_ORD IS NOT NULL;

nodes.name: Query to fetch details of Source - Loyalty and Site Visit Done or Revisit Done

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT *
FROM `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.sales_sv_oppr`
WHERE LeadSource = 'Loyalty'
AND Lead_Sub_Source__c = "Loyalty"
AND StageName = 'Booking confirmed' AND Booking__c IS NOT NULL AND Booking__c_Status__c IN ('Booked', 'Processed') AND Referral_Booking__c_Status__c IN ('Booked', 'Processed') AND SAL_ORD IS NOT NULL;

nodes.name: Query to fetch details of Source - Loyalty and Booking Done

parameters.query:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM wallet_transaction_logs
  WHERE customer_code = '{{$json.customer_code}}'
    AND lead_id = '{{$json.lead_id}}'
    AND remarks = '{{$json.remarks}}'
    AND status = 'SUCCESS'
);

/* SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM wallet_transaction_logs
  WHERE customer_code = '{{$json.customer_code}}'
  AND remarks = '{{$json.remarks}}'
  AND status = 'SUCCESS'
); */

/* SELECT status
FROM wallet_transaction_logs
WHERE customer_code = '{{$json.customer_code}}'
AND remarks = '{{$json.remarks}}'
AND status = 'SUCCESS'
LIMIT 1; */

INSERT INTO wallet_transaction_logs (
    customer_code,
    lead_id,
    amount,
    remarks,
    reference_id,
    transaction_note,
    status,
    status_code,
    message,
    request_payload,
    response_payload,
    execution_id,
    created_at
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.customer_code}},
    '{{$json.lead_id}}',
    {{$json.amount || 0}},
    '{{($json.remarks || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.reference_id ? `'${$json.reference_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    '{{($json.transaction_note || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{($json.status || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.status_code || 500}},
    '{{($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.request_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.response_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    {{$json.execution_id ? `'${$json.execution_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    NOW()
);

/* INSERT INTO wallet_transaction_logs (
    customer_code,
    amount,
    remarks,
    reference_id,
    transaction_note,
    status,
    status_code,
    message,
    request_payload,
    response_payload,
    execution_id,
    created_at
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.customer_code}},
    {{$json.amount || 0}},
    '{{($json.remarks || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.reference_id ? `'${$json.reference_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    '{{($json.transaction_note || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{($json.status || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.status_code || 500}},
    '{{($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.request_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.response_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    {{$json.execution_id ? `'${$json.execution_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    NOW()
); */

nodes.name: Query to fetch details of Source - Loyalty1

parameters.query:
SELECT column_name, data_type
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_name = 'wallet_transaction_logs'
ORDER BY ordinal_position;
/* SELECT status
FROM wallet_transaction_logs
WHERE customer_code = '{{$json.customer_code}}'
AND remarks = '{{$json.remarks}}'
AND status = 'SUCCESS'
LIMIT 1; */
